svg.title: Code Review Agent pipeline diagram
svg.desc: A vertical flowchart showing the 7 stages of the Code Review Agent: Input, Ingestion, Static Analysis, Planner, Critic, Rewriter, and Reconciler, ending at Output.

g.text: Chunks code by function / class via AST
Identifies all issues — breadth first, no filter
Generates exact fixes for approved issues only
Deduplicates · ranks by impact · no LLM call
